hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if ! (cd /workspace && uv run ruff format . && uv run ruff check . 2>&1); then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "ruff format/check failed — fix lint errors before committing"}'; fi; fi
